title: cr_verify_broker - arguments
description: Fetch a freight broker's verified profile and canonical 0-100 trust_score (with per-factor breakdown + breakdown_max + data_confidence), at full dashboard parity. US brokers (mc_number or dot_number): live FMCSA profile, authority status, full surety bond detail (broker.bond: BMC-84/85 type, surety company, amount, effective/cancellation dates, classification flags, freshness), fraud/identity signals - fraud_signals: the same 7-signal set the dashboard's fraud card shows (sanctions, industry fraud reports, broker authority, bond, bond classification, payout/remit-to changes, tender blocks), plus raw double_broker_signals hits and advisory_flags - and risk_assessment. Canadian brokers: provide cab_id (e.g. CAB-ON-0000157) for the Cipher & Row Canadian registry profile (province, verification band, CTQ status) with the same canonical trust_score. If you only have a legal name, call cr_search_registry first to resolve the identifier.

annotations.title: Verify broker (US FMCSA or Canadian registry)

mc_number.description: US broker MC number. Provide one of mc_number / dot_number / cab_id.

dot_number.description: US broker USDOT number. Provide one of mc_number / dot_number / cab_id.

cab_id.description: Canadian broker CAB number, format CAB-XX-NNNNNNN. Provide one of mc_number / dot_number / cab_id.
